changes.value:
`swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/merge/jsonl.rs`, `merge/yaml.rs`, `merge/md.rs` (~30 lines each)

All three CLI driver files contain nearly identical logic for reading the base, ours, and theirs paths from the command line and returning early with a non-zero exit code on I/O error.

Extract a shared helper, e.g.:
```rust
fn read_three_files(base: &Path, ours: &Path, theirs: &Path) -> Result<(String, String, String), i32>
```
and call it from each driver. This reduces the surface area for diverging error-handling behavior across the three drivers."
[NIT] File-read boilerplate duplicated across three CLI merge driver files
